mapper.select: SELECT sc.*, c.credit FROM score sc LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE sc.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY sc.semester DESC, sc.create_time DESC

SELECT COALESCE(AVG(sc.score), 0) as avgScore, COALESCE(MAX(sc.score), 0) as maxScore, COALESCE(MIN(sc.score), 0) as minScore, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0) as passRate FROM score sc WHERE 1=1 AND sc.course_id = #{query.courseId} AND sc.semester = #{query.semester}
SELECT sc.*, c.credit FROM score sc LEFT JOIN course c ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE sc.score < 60 AND sc.semester = #{semester} ORDER BY sc.score ASC
